title: Ultimately Optimized - Vanilla but Better!
description: [April Fools] My dreamed version of a Vanilla instance. This modpack fulfils all your needs from Vanilla and immerses you in it!
body:
## ⚡ Read Before Downloading: ##
### Most versions of this modpack comes with 2 versions for releases: Classic and Fairplay ###

### Classic:
Offers the complete and modpack's default experience but includes some mods that some people might consider cheating or make you banned/kicked from public servers. - **Usually includes these key mods**:
> - Better Third Person
> - GammaUtils
> - Axiom
> - Freecam
> - Bridging Mod
> - Accurate Block Placement Reborn
> - Xaero's Minimap
> - Xaero's World Map
> - Bactromod _(Only on older versions of the modpack - Replaces some mods above.)_
>
> And many more... - The differences between Classic and Fairplay versions vary for each version of this modpack.

**Classic versions don't have a suffix at the end of their version names.** - Example of a classic version to download: _26.2+0.1.0_

### Fairplay:
Offers a safe option to play on public servers. Still having most of QoL features and all of the optimization mods.

**Fairplay version names end with "-fair".** - Example of a Fairplay version to download: _26.2+0.1.0-fair_

---

### Please report any bugs you might find or any suggestions you might have to our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/5PCXmRYcJc). ###

#

## ❗ Disclaimar: ## 
> This modpack **is intended not to modify the server-side part of the game** (like no new blocks etc). But **some optimization patches might have parity differences with Vanilla in singleplayer worlds**.
>
> Examples:
>
> **Noisium mod** generates features a little bit different compared to Vanilla. It's noticeable when comparing the tree locations.
>
> **Ksyxis mod** removes spawn chunks to speed up game loading and improve perfomance. - Won't exist in 1.21.9+ because Minecraft did this!
>
> **Server Core mod** on some versions of this modpack, might modify entity spawning within chunk borders and few other tiny, non-noticable changes.
>
> (1.16.1 version is perfectly on par with Vanilla as it's a speedrun-special version.)
>
> ### You can remove the mods above to achieve perfect parity with Vanilla. ###

# ❗ About
> ### ❓ Why Ultimately Optimized? ###
> ###
> The main reason to choose this modpack is the **QoL (Quality of Life) mods/resourcepacks**. Remember this isn't a vanilla+ modpack, because **it doesn't change any of Vanilla Minecraft's mechanics**. So you can enjoy an optimized version of Minecraft with all your wished features in a server with your friends or singleplayer world. Also, public servers that have too many players in them will not lag your PC.
> ###
> This modpack **is available for 3 recent April Fools snapshots and some older vanilla Minecraft versions** , too. (Check Version Support part for more info.) These versions tend to get less updates from me.

> 💯 Note that although this modpack includes many QoL features, **1.16.1 version of this modpack only includes speedrun-only mods and thus, it's safe for submission to speedrun.com**.

> 🧑‍💻 This modpack **is just in Modrinth and won't be ported to Curseforge**.
# 📃 Features #
> ### Check out the Gallery tab to see features. ###
> 
> Note: The Gallery tab is showing features "mostly referring to 1.21.4 and 1.21.5" versions of this modpack. Some of those features might not be available in other versions.
# 💡 Check Out My Other Modpacks #
> **Create Ultimate Pack - The Industrial Age** : The **ultimate experiance of Create mod and its addons**.
>
> 
> **[Check It Out Right Now](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-ultimate-pack)**
>
> 
> **Low on Water! The Ultimate Realism** : A **realistic** modpack which **relies on physics and realism**. Probably not more dragons, because it isn't RLCraft! **Currently in Alpha stage.**
>
>
> **[Check It Out Right Now](https://modrinth.com/modpack/low-on-water)**
>
# ➕ Version Support
> 🧑‍💻 The development of this modpack **is more focused on the latest version** but sometimes older versions also get updates.

Note that this list can be subject to change.
>✅: Is currently supported. (Supported means that this modpack has a version for it)
> 
>❌: Isn't currently supported but it will be later. (The support for these versions might not be released until all other versions reach a stable Release.)
> 
>➖: Isn't supported and I don't have any plans for supporting it in the future.

> Also, every version not listed here won't be supported. (Probably!)

A summary of it means that you, as a user of this project, can **redistributable my project as long as it isn't modified, it isn't for commercial use, and you credit me and my project**.

#

### ... Small Notes & Credits ###
- The modpack icon is generated by AI (Bing Image Creator) — as I suck with image editing 🫣.
- Almost none of the mods or shaderpacks (about resourcepacks, the two resourcepacks [Icons Fixed](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-fix) and [Leave My Hotbar Alone](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/leave-my-hotbar-alone!) are mine, but no other than that) in this modpack are mine and must be credited to their respective owners. That means I haven't made any mods or shaderpacks for this modpack. The things are mine are the two resourcepacks [Icons Fixed](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-fix) and [Leave My Hotbar Alone](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/leave-my-hotbar-alone!), and also the pre-loading screens for the version 1.21.5 and after.
